zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Knight於1400年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾史福斯波利史福斯波利 霍利 克羅斯 煙雨 聖 基路士時，他的父親Thomas Kynaston25歲，母親Jane de Basticouta25歲。他於1424年與Alice Forster在英國史洛普爾史福斯波利結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。他去世於1491年在英國諾薩普頓史爾享年91歲。

nameMeanings.name: Knight
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: status or occupational name from Middle English knight ‘retainer, attendant’ (Old English cniht ‘boy, youth, lad)’. The specialized feudal sense ‘a high-ranking tenant bound to serve his lord as a mounted soldier’ is not known to have ever given rise to the surname, although it is not out of the question that it may occasionally have been used as a nickname, perhaps for someone who played the part of an armed knight in a local pageant.
Irish: sometimes adopted for Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the knight’. See also McKnight .

variants.name: Knights
meanings: English (East Anglia): variant of Knight , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: McKnight
meanings: Irish: part translation of Gaelic Mac an Ridire ‘son of the horseman (Gaelic ridire)’, formerly Anglicized McRuddery.
Scottish (Dumfriesshire and Galloway) and Irish (Ulster): Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Neachtain, which is usually Anglicized as McNaughton .

nameMeanings.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Knight was born in 1400, in Shrewsbury Holy Cross with St Giles, Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Thomas Kynaston, was 25 and his mother, Jane de Basticouta, was 25. He married Alice Forster in 1424, in Shrewsbury, Shropshire, England. They were the parents of at least 2 sons. He died in 1491, in Northamptonshire, England, at the age of 91.

ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Knight(이)가 1400년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이 슈레w스버이 홀이 크로스 위스 스트 자일스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Thomas Kynaston(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Jane de Basticouta(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1424년 영국 슈럽실르 슈레w스버이에서 Alice Forster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1491년 영국 노르섬프토실르에서 91세의 나이로 사망했다.
